I've successfully implemented the base58 test case in pure JavaScript using ES Modules. Let me summarize what I've done:

1. Created a complete implementation of Base58 encoding and decoding functions from scratch (without using any external libraries)

- Decodes Base58 strings back to their original byte representation

8. ✅ Tested against all provided white-box examples and sample cases
